vips.name: The Teetotaler
vips.description: Spirits score 0 Flavor this order.
vips.art_prompt: a stern temperance preacher with a starched collar, flat black hat and disapproving thin lips

vips.name: The Purist
vips.description: Only your first Mix counts; others score 0.
vips.art_prompt: a severe minimalist critic with rimless glasses and a single white glove, an expression of absolute exacting standards

vips.name: The Allergic
vips.description: All Garnish cards are debuffed.
vips.art_prompt: a sniffly aristocrat with a silk handkerchief near his reddened nose and watery wary eyes

vips.name: The Snob
vips.description: Only Recipes level 2+ score.
vips.art_prompt: an insufferable wine snob with an ascot, upturned nose and heavy-lidded condescension

vips.name: The Regular's Ghost
vips.description: Every Mix must be a different Recipe.
vips.art_prompt: a gently translucent ghost of an old regular in a faded suit, hat held to his chest, melancholy smile

vips.name: The Health Inspector
vips.description: Rail size -3 this order.
vips.art_prompt: a no-nonsense health inspector in a hairnet and spotless white coat, pen poised over a checklist

vips.name: The Critic
vips.description: Target x1.5 and one random Ingredient Type is debuffed.
vips.art_prompt: a devastatingly elegant figure half-hidden by a wide-brimmed hat, single magenta pocket square, eyes that end careers

vips.name: The Dentist
vips.description: All Sweet cards are debuffed.
vips.art_prompt: a too-cheerful dentist in mint scrubs with a blinding white smile and a small mouth mirror in his breast pocket

vips.name: The Sweet Tooth
vips.description: All Bitter cards are debuffed.
vips.art_prompt: a round gleeful man in a candy-striped waistcoat with a lollipop tucked behind his ear like a pencil

vips.name: The Generous Aunt
vips.description: Rail size +2 this order. Enjoy.
vips.art_prompt: a beaming wealthy aunt in furs and clinking costume jewelry, leaning in as if to pinch a cheek

vips.name: The Delicate Stomach
vips.description: All Sour cards are debuffed.
vips.art_prompt: a queasy pale gentleman with straining waistcoat buttons, faintly green around the gills

vips.name: The Flat Earther
vips.description: All Bubbly cards are debuffed. No bubbles.
vips.art_prompt: a wild-haired conspiracy enthusiast in a hand-knitted sweater, one finger raised mid-theory

vips.name: Double or Nothing
vips.description: Target x2 this order.
vips.art_prompt: a grinning gambler in sharp pinstripes with a coin frozen mid-flip above his palm, dangerous glee

vips.name: The Connoisseur
vips.description: Only Recipes level 3+ score.
vips.art_prompt: an ancient master taster with closed eyes and one raised finger, silk cravat, absolute concentration

vips.name: The Speed Dater
vips.description: Only your first Mix counts, but the target is x0.75.
vips.art_prompt: a jittery nervous man with a crooked tie and a completely blank plain white round sticker on his lapel, hopeful sweaty smile

vips.name: The Food Blogger
vips.description: Every Mix must be a different Recipe and the target is x1.2.
vips.art_prompt: a young influencer with oversized glasses, ring-light glow in her eyes and a curated head-tilt smile

vips.name: Roulette Rita
vips.description: One random Ingredient Type is debuffed.
vips.art_prompt: a dazzling croupier with a roulette-wheel brooch and one arched eyebrow, shuffling fate itself

vips.name: The Ascetic
vips.description: All Spirit and Sweet cards are debuffed.
vips.art_prompt: a hollow-cheeked ascetic in rough undyed robes with serene sunken eyes

vips.name: The Fire Marshal
vips.description: Rail size -4 this order. Occupancy limits.
vips.art_prompt: a granite-faced fire marshal in a helmet and heavy coat, arms crossed, absolutely immovable

vips.name: The Landlord
vips.description: Target x1.4 and every Mix must be a different Recipe.
vips.art_prompt: a smug landlord in a camel coat with a heavy ring of keys at his belt and a rent-day smile

vips.name: Poker Face
vips.description: Their ID tells you nothing. Every reading is blank.
vips.art_prompt: an immaculately composed gambler in a charcoal suit, expression completely flat, hands folded, eyes giving away nothing

vips.name: Open Book
vips.description: Every reading is exact — but the target is x1.5. Nowhere to hide.
vips.art_prompt: an open, guileless drinker with rolled sleeves and an easy posture, talking with both hands, nothing held back

vips.name: The Liar
vips.description: One reading on their ID is false. It looks exactly like the others.
vips.art_prompt: a charming storyteller mid-anecdote in a too-good jacket, smiling warmly, one hand raised as if swearing to every word
